{{Quote|You'd be daft if you wanted to go there. Nonetheless, it's your life, not mine.|[[Talia v'laenya]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:Tv">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|Talia v'laenya|Lok}}</ref>}}
'''Kimogila Town''' was an abandoned city on the planet [[Lok/Legends|Lok]].

==History==
{{Quote|I knew you were hungry for information. Which location do you want to hear about? I have information regarding the 'Kimogila Town', and 'Canyon Corsair Stronghold'. They are all interesting places, I assure you.|Talia v'laenya, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:Tv" />}}
Once an inhabited town, the city was was overrun by massive [[Kimogila]]s, forcing its inhabitants to flee and leaving its structures to waste away. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], many criminals took advantage of this situation to sold pieces of land that they claimed was prime real estate. The victims would then travel to the town and meet their fate at the jaws of Kimogila packs.<ref name="SWG:KT" /> The [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Talia v'laenya]] once encountered a spacer in [[Nym's Stronghold]] and provided information about Kimogila Town.<ref name="SWG:Tv" />

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the town became the scene of fighting between [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operatives.<ref name="SWG:P28">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other}}Publish 28</ref><ref name="DC">{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?id=66864&resource=features|text=Duty Calls!}}</ref> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a Rebel agent killed the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Vekis Kiyanu]] in Kimogila Town because he was pursuing a personal vendetta against [[Nien Nunb/Legends|Nien Nunb]].<ref name="SWG:HNN">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=faction|Rebel|Helping Nien Nunb|Lok}}</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Kimogila Town was the place of a meeting organized to negotiate peace between the [[Sulfur Lake Pirates]] and [[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]].<ref name="SWG:NP">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Negotiate Peace|Lok}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Kimogila Town was a location in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:KT" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Kimogila Town was added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 1 Notes: 13 August 03|Publish 1]]" update, released on [[August 3]], 2003.<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 1: Nightsisters Cave">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60888|text=Publish 1: Nightsisters Cave}}</ref>
